reasoning: The market estimated a 5% chance on October 30, 2025, with only two months remaining until the December 31, 2025 deadline. There are significant legal and bureaucratic barriers to forming an official political party recognized by the FEC (which often requires fielding candidates, a convention, etc. — not just registering a PAC). By November 9, 2025, over a week has passed with no additional news provided to suggest Musk has taken concrete steps since his June remarks. The lack of momentum and the shrinking timeline (less than 55 days left) means the probability should decay slightly below the recent 5% market consensus.
